source_note: Order of the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission on Duke Energy Indiana, LLC's application for a change in its fuel cost adjustment for electric (and high-pressure steam) service under Ind. Code 8-1-2-42, IURC Cause No. 38707 FAC 147, approved April 8, 2026. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF at the deterministic IURC order path www.in.gov/iurc/files/; case search iurc.portal.in.gov.

company: Northern Indiana Public Service Company LLC
source_note: Order of the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission on the verified petition of Northern Indiana Public Service Company LLC (NIPSCO) for approval of a fuel cost adjustment for the February–April 2025 billing cycles under Ind. Code 8-1-2-42, IURC Cause No. 38706 FAC 145, issued January 29, 2025. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF at www.in.gov/iurc/files/; case search iurc.portal.in.gov.

company: Indianapolis Power & Light Company d/b/a AES Indiana
source_note: Order of the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission on the application of Indianapolis Power & Light Company d/b/a AES Indiana for approval of a fuel cost factor for the September–November 2021 billing months under I.C. 8-1-2-42, IURC Cause No. 38703 FAC 132, issued August 25, 2021.
